name: Stack Layout
description: One-dimensional non-wrapping layout for stacking items in row/column directions with responsive control and optional separators.

as.description: Polymorphic root element for semantic markup.

direction.description: Main-axis direction; supports responsive breakpoint values.

gap.description: Spacing between items. Numeric values map to Salt spacing units.

separators.description: Adds separators between items. `true` maps to centered separators.

slots.children: Stacked content items rendered in order.

keyboard: No layout-specific keyboard interaction; keyboard behavior comes from interactive descendants
aria: Use semantic HTML via `as` when StackLayout represents meaningful structure
Ensure child content provides its own labels/roles where needed
